［一二章简单铺垫，第三章迪化］
纪评偶尔会反思自己过去的几年。
他的日常是简单的三点一线，回家，吃饭，研读书籍，再加一个接委托赚钱糊口。
看起来没什么大问题。
最多是他信仰了一位足够仁慈的邪神，并因此总遇上乱七八糟的事情。

嗷嗷，有位姐妹在我评论“真理高塔:so,you will be like them?Abandon me?”下面回复让我不要乱用英语，be like是像的意思，like才是喜欢。[捂脸]
 在这里解释一下蛤，这里就是be like,“像”的意思，不是like的意思哦，全文翻译是“所以你会像他们一样抛弃我”这是一个梗哦宝宝[害羞]
姐妹下次注意看完评论哦[送心]
为了照顾下你，不让你的名字被看到，我把那个评论删掉了，但是我会重新发一遍的，并且为了防止有像你一样的小宝贝，这次会在下面批注好英语意思的[送心]真是，感谢宝宝让我发现了不能随便用英语！！！非常感谢[飞吻]","text_exts":[{"e":229,"s":225,"text":"你的名字","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BD%A0%E7%9A%84%E5%90%8D%E5%AD%97&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177413646450F054D3%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227375192684939871038%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227296055497633827902%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BD%A0%E7%9A%84%E5%90%8D%E5%AD%97%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1717174362,"group_id":"7296055497633827902","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"鄙人已经进化为钮钴禄氏族的了，少哔哔赖赖🤫","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxHY4E7YYdaxPNLXrvDj+j4=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/92871898f4d84de3a1cf150f7fb7b7ce~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701386&x-signature=HxC8E%2FFaN5m2cj7v%2BZfj%2FpbsNrg%3D","user_id":"169744250705192","user_name":"钮钴禄妙脆角"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"169744250705192","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7296055497633827902","book_info":{"abstract":"［西幻+迪化+无女主+微马甲+微克系］
